parsed_review.summary:
CP00-778 (RP25 Migration Platform permission fixture failure foundation, Risk C, 150 units, RP25.P06.M06.S09-RP25.P07.M02.S02) passes hardened read-only review. The pack is a descriptor-only continuation of the CP756-777 series and does NOT claim production_ready, runtime_ready, or enterprise trust (manifest/command-evidence/construction-inspection all report production_ready=false, in_progress, verdict PENDING awaiting this receipt); the descriptor-verified readiness it does assert is fully supported.

Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) Implementation — registry.js MIGRATION_PLATFORM_CP778_PACK_BINDING + REQUIREMENTS with deliverable counts {implementation:41, ui:20, claude_review:6, security_audit:28, test:22, hermes_evidence:5, failure_recovery:26, fixture:2}=150, hand-recomputed against the baseline included_units (impl 41 and failure_recovery 26 confirmed by tally) and enforced by validateMigrationPlatformCp778PermissionFixtureFailureFoundationCoverage; new PERMISSION_MATRIX_FAILURE_ROWS (20 rows) matches P07.M00/M01 and slice(0,2) for P07.M02 exactly; service.js descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff factories and index.js re-exports present. (2) Boundaries — validators.js rejects any row opening file-server/SharePoint/Drive/iManage/import runtime, any raw/source/credential/real-client payload, permission-decision/cross-tenant/audit-body exposure, runtime-render claims, leak-guard drift, and unverified knowledge creation; authority asserts claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false. Contract projection, manifest implementation_summary, and command-evidence consistently attest descriptor_only/no_real_data/writes_product_state=false. (3) Validation — all required commands (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate) plus git diff --check recorded exit_code 0 with no non-zero codes; contract validation.valid=true, latest_pack=CP00-778, cp778 coverage valid:true/errors:[]; model.test.js covers CP778 binding, coverage, runtime-closed descriptor, and latest projection. (4) Review hardening — auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON, non-zero stdout); Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false / no product-state write (deterministic evidence/receipt only, not product runtime); invalid_review_blockers include not_logged_in, malformed_json, usage_limit, tool_call_shaped_output, zero_byte_stdout, fenced_json_with_prose. The pending claude-review-result.json placeholder (0-byte stdout, PENDING) is correctly uncounted (valid_review_receipts:[]) and represents the pre-review template, not a submitted invalid attempt.

Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver; blocks_goal_closeout=false because this receipt carries no runtime/enterprise-trust claim and the human-approval boundary is expected and external. Unrelated dirty files (workbook/*, docs/ldip-integration, progress-control-room) are correctly out of pack scope and not attributed to CP00-778. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
